title: Pass 5.A.4 follow-up: implement gloo backend FFI bindings
description:
Replaces closed #459 (Add additional distributed backends: Gloo, MPI, UCC). The gloo_backend.rs module is currently a fail-fast skeleton (every Backend method returns Err(BackendUnavailable { backend: "gloo" })). Real implementation requires:

- gloo-sys crate with C++ FFI (Gloo is C++; needs bindgen + cmake-driven build of libgloo)
- Rust wrapper exposing allreduce / allgather / broadcast / barrier / send / recv
- CI coverage on Linux + macOS (Gloo doesn't ship Windows officially)

Estimated 2000+ LoC + new C++ dep. Gated behind `gloo-backend` feature (default off).
